title: draba minima
intro: Draba minima, also known as field cabbage or small whitlow grass, is a low-growing, annual plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Draba minima typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin issues, wounds, and respiratory problems.
